name: Sicilian Pasta Salad Piccata
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken breasts, boneless and skinned
1/3 cup Olive oil or vegetable oil
1 1/2 cups Thinly sliced sweet red peppers, cut into 2-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. Rinse with cold water to cool quickly; drain well.
3. In a small saucepan, place chicken breasts; cover with wine and water.
4. Simmer, uncovered, about 20 minutes or until done; discard liquid.
5. Set chicken aside to cool.
6. Cut chicken into strips.
7. In a small bowl, whisk together oil, vinegar, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper.
8. In a large bowl, combine pasta, chicken, and oil mixture.
9. Add red peppers, parsley, onion, and capers; mix thoroughly.
10. Cover; refrigerate.
